  "claims": [
    "New Economics for Women (NEW) was founded in 1985 as the first Latina-operated nonprofit community economic development organization in the country.",
    "NEW's mission is to reduce poverty and build economic mobility, particularly for Latinas and their families.",
    "In 2022, NEW served 42,245 people, which is a 180% increase from pre-pandemic years.",
    "NEW helped to start 90 new businesses in 2022.",
    "NEW generated $30,930,926 in assets for its clients in 2022.",
    "NEW created 355 new jobs in 2022.",

    "NEW deployed over $18 million in COVID relief assistance."
